description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered yellow finish and visible signs of rust and grime, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The top surface is metallic with a bolted, reinforced pattern, indicating durability and industrial use. Around the middle of the barrel, there are horizontal metal bands and rivets, providing structural reinforcement. The most prominent feature is a large black biohazard symbol painted on the side, warning of hazardous contents. The surface shows dents and stains, further emphasizing its rugged, utilitarian nature. This barrel is typically used for storing or transporting dangerous materials in urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered yellow metal barrel with a biohazard symbol, reinforced bands, and a bolted metallic top, showing signs of rust and dents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black biohazard symbol and the most prominent weathering and grime.
description_view_1: Side view with partial biohazard symbol visible and clear view of the metal banding and rivets.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible markings, showing the full extent of the weathered yellow surface and metal bands.
description_view_3: Side view with a dented area and partial biohazard symbol, highlighting surface damage and reinforcement.
